name: MODERN HEA.TEC.HOLD.HD-10
summary: Modern Healthcare Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides beauty and wellness services in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, Singapore, and Australia. The company operates in two segments, Beauty and Wellness Services, and Skincare and Wellness Products. It offers beauty and facial services; aesthetics services, such as skincare treatment, professional consultation, and referral services on plastic reconstruction; slimming services, including weight management programs; and spa and massage services comprising resplendent bathroom furnishings and a hydrotherapeutic pool, as well as foot spa, foot treatment, and foot massage services. The company also sells skincare and wellness products under the be, FERRECARE, p.e.n, Y.U.E., Advanced Natural, Malu Wilz, BeYu, Fanola, Byothea, Mila d'Opiz, Care Plus, Cellnoc, Mu-lan Spa, Veribel, Castille, and IconX brand names. In addition, it provides franchise and trademark services in relation to beautification and gymnastic services; advertising services; management services; dental services; and beauty consultancy, marketing, and management services, as well as leases properties, and plant and equipment. Additionally, the company holds properties. As of March 31, 2020, the company had 32 service centers in Hong Kong; 3 service centers in Mainland China; and 10 service centers in Singapore, as well as 10 be Beauty Shop outlets. The company was formerly known as Modern Beauty Salon Holdings Limited and changed its name to Modern Healthcare Technology Holdings Limited in June 2020. Modern Healthcare Technology Holdings Limited was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Kowloon Bay, Hong Kong.
